subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! Upon thee be the glory of God and His grace, His bounty and His tender mercies in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه علیک بهاٌالله وفضله وجوده و الطافه فی اولاک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
